response.justification: Bogdan is a capable generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine recent exposure to MCP tooling and agentic workflow frameworks, which are directly relevant to the role's key technologies. However, he falls well short of the Staff GenAI requirements in three critical areas: Python is entirely absent from his skill set despite being the primary language listed; his AI-specific experience appears limited to roughly 13 months at his current employer, far below the 8-year minimum for production-grade AI solutions; and the resume shows no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or the enterprise-customer-facing technical leadership that defines this consulting-heavy role.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generator and agentic workflow experience at his current staff-level role, directly matching a listed key technology
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise across multiple senior and staff positions, including AWS CDK work at Pinepoint Systems
Long track record of staff-level scope and cross-domain breadth (web, mobile, embedded, DevOps, data) demonstrating adaptability
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his skills and employment history, yet it is the primary language requirement for this position
Production AI/GenAI experience appears limited to approximately 13 months at Acme Software, far below the required 8-year minimum
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM performance tuning, or enterprise stakeholder-facing technical discovery sessions
